titleStmt.title: SII 20.232: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 232. (B.K. No. 33 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Three sides of a pillar in Śankhabasti in Basti-baṇa.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 1334, Nandana, Mārgaśira, śu. 2, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1412, November 2, Sunday.

This refers to a dispute between Hēmadēvāchārya of Śaṅkhabasti at Huligere and Sivarāmayya, the achārya of Sōmadēva temple of the same place regarding the land belonging to the respective temples. The dispute was referred to Mahāpradhāna Nāgaṇṇa-daṇḍanāyaka, at whose command purōhita Saṅgamadēva and the learned people of the place studied the documents (śāsana) of both the parties, and settled it in favour of Hēmadēvāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1334 nē naṁdana saṁvatsarada mārggasira śu 2
Ā śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa hariharamahā
rāyara kumāraru dēvarāya mahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁ gaivalli tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi śrīmanmāhāpradhāna nāgaṁṇa daṁṇāykarige huligeṟe
ya śaṁkha(ra)bastiya hēmadēvācāryyarkaṁ Ā huligeṟeya sōmya
dēvara sthānadācāryyaru sivarāmaiyyagaḷigeyu Ā Ūra taṁma taṁma dē
vasthānaṁgaḷa bhūmiya vivādavādalli Ā yeraḍu sthānadācāryyaru
nāgaṁṇadaṁṇāykarige biṁnāhaṁ māḍalāgi purōhita saṁ
gamadēvagaḷu Aramaneya vidvāṁnugaḷanu kūḍikoṁḍu yittaṁḍa
da śāsanavanu vōdisi nōḍi tiddi koḍa
rājādhyakṣa kaḷihidalli hēmadēvavācāryyarige nirnēsi koṭṭa
jayapatrada kramavaṁteṁdoḍe nīu yittaṁḍau vidvāṁnugaḷu hēḷida
hāge kēḷuveU yeṁdu daṁṇāykara hesara Āṇe vōlegaḷanu
koṭṭalli tiddida prakāra Ā hēmadēvācāryyara kaiyali yidda śāsanaṁ
gaḷanu vōdi nōḍalāgi Ā bhūmiya vanayavanu paṭadalli baṁdu nōḍi A
hēmadēvācāryyara kaiyali yidda śāsanastitiyanu kaṁḍu Ā sivarāmaiyaga
ḷa Aṁṇa gaṁgaṁṇaAyyagaḷa kaiyalidda śāsanaṁgaḷanu vōdi nōḍalāgi
Ā huligeṟeya yīśāṁnyada muṁneya Olanoḷage nālvattu mattarada bhū
miya catussīmeyanu baradu nōḍalāgi teṁkalu beḷkanūra mūḍa
da paḍuvalu śaṁkha(ra)bastiya śāsanasthavaha yēka nivarttanāṁtaravaha
yugalapramāṇina vaḷeyave Āvadhiyāgi yinitu baḍaga mūḍalu
śaṁkha(ra)bastiya sīmeyanu nālvatu matara bhūmiya catussīmeya vaḷeya
śaṁka(ra)bastiya bhūmiya vaḷeyavanu yaha kaṁḍadilla Ā viṣayavāgi saṁ
vājava māḍasalladu ṟu sāvirada mūḍanaladoḷu Ā hadinālku ma
tara bhūmi śaṁkha(ra)bastiya śāsana pramāṇina bhūmiya Oḷage hadinālku
matara bhūmi śaṁkha(ra)bastiya śāsana pramāṇina bhūmiya baḍaga
kaṁḍadilla māḍasalladu Ā hē
madēvācāryyarugaḷa

ḍagi saṁvājava māḍutaṁ yidāreṁdu kēḷalāgi kudanūra giriyaṁṇagaḷu bomai
yana sāvappa dēharada sōvappa mārggada mūṟu kayyanu Avaru
vyavasāyava māḍiveṁdare nāu mā sada Āṇeyiḍuta baheU Āṇe
mīṟi balameyiṁda sivarāmaiyyagaḷavaru māḍutta baharu nāu naṁma kaige sikkida
Aṣṭanu koṁbeU kālakālada beḷeyanu naṁma kaige sikkidaṣṭanu koṁbeU yī sthitiya
nu huligeṟey�nāgagauḍa samasta nāgiseṭṭi muṁḍara kāmiseṭṭi gaḍḍada kētiseṭṭiya
seṭṭi muṁtāda gauḍu prajegaḷu nāu Aṇeyiḍuvadanu sivarāma
beḷeya koṁba huligeṟeya
ḍa muṁtāda gauḍu prajegaḷu ballaru Eṁdu hēmadēvācāryyaru hēḷalāgi vidvā
nugaḷu sivarāmayyaṁgaḷa Aṁṇa gaṁgaṇayagaḷanu karadu hēmadēvācā
ryyaranu karadu harihararāyara kālatoḍagi yiṁdu pariyaṁtaradalu hu
ligeṟeya nāgagauḍa muṁtāda gauḍu prajegaḷu harihararāyara manvaṁtara
pariyaṁtaravāgi yī mūṟu keyyanu nirāsēdadalli sivarāma Ayyagaḷu bhōgisi
hareṁdu huligeṟeya nāgagauḍa muṁtāda gauḍu prajegaḷeṁdare Ā hēmadēvacāryya
ru Ā mūṟu keyyanu sivarāma Ayyagaḷige biḍuvaru yī mūṟu keyyanu hēmadēvā
cāryyaravaru Asēdhavanu māḍutiralāgi Ākramaṇadalli Ā sivarāmayyagaḷava
ru bhōgisutaṁ yiddhāreṁdu nāgagauḍa muṁtāda gauḍuprajegaḷeṁdare Ā mūṟu kai
yū hēmadēvācāryyarige saluvau A nāgagauḍa muṁtāda prajegaḷu hēḷida ma riyā
deyalu nīu yittaṁḍau tiddikoṁḍeveṁdu nāgaṁṇadaṁṇāyakkara hesara Āṇe bhārada Ō
leyanu bēḍidare Ā hēmadēvācāryyaru nāgagauḍamuṁtāda gauḍu prajegaḷu hēḷi
da hāge kēḷuveU yeṁdu daṁṇāykara hesara Āṇebhārada Ōleyanu koṭṭaru Ā
sivarāmaAyyagaḷa Āṁṇa gaṁgaya nāgagauḍa muṁtāda prajegaḷu hē
[ḷida hāge kēḷuveU] yeṁdu daṁṇāykara hesara Āṇe bhārada vōleyanu bēḍidare
rāgi taṁma kayali dake dēvara śāsanavaṁ voḷage śaṁ
kha(ra)bastiya śāsanaṁ yi dirāgi Ā huli
geṟeya yīśānyada volada nālaku mattaru bhūmiyāgi śaṁkha(ra)basti
ya bhūmiya
mūḍa kelado
Ā hēmadēvācāryya
ra kaiyalidda śāsanasthaṁgaḷa
vāgi sivarāmayyaṁgaḷu

ya viṣayavāgi hēmadēvācāryyara kūḍe vivādavanu māḍa salladeṁdu
śrī vīrapratāpadēvarāyamahārāyara Aramaneya purōhita saṁgamadēva
gaḷu vidvānugaḷu hēmadēvācāryyarige nirnnaisi koṭṭa jayapatra yī
Arddhakke saṁgamadēvagaḷa vidvāṁnugaḷa suhastada barahaṁgaḷu saṁga
madēvagaḷa baraha śrīdharadīkṣitara baraha virūpākṣabhaṭṭara baraha ceṁnakraThe letter ha is written below the line.
ṣṇadīkṣatara baraha tārkkika naraharibhaṭṭara baraha bukkaṁṇagaḷa baraha śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
